title: Debug assertion sqlite3FinishCoding: Assertion `!pParse->isMultiWrite || sqlite3VdbeAssertMayAbort(v, pParse->mayAbort)' failed
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 PRIMARY KEY, c1, c2 UNIQUE) WITHOUT ROWID;
INSERT OR FAIL INTO t0(c2) VALUES (0), (NULL) ON CONFLICT(c2) DO UPDATE SET c1 = c0
description:
mrigger added on 2019-12-26 22:44:05:
Consider the following test case:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 PRIMARY KEY, c1, c2 UNIQUE) WITHOUT ROWID;
INSERT OR FAIL INTO t0(c2) VALUES (0), (NULL) ON CONFLICT(c2) DO UPDATE SET c1 = c0 -- sqlite3.c:108474: sqlite3FinishCoding: Assertion `!pParse->isMultiWrite || sqlite3VdbeAssertMayAbort(v, pParse->mayAbort)' failed.
When compiling with -DSQLITE_DEBUG, the INSERT triggers an assertion error.
key_bug_features: INSERT OR FAIL with ON CONFLICT triggers assertion error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, email TEXT UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO t1(name, age, email) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com');
INSERT OR FAIL INTO t1(email) VALUES (NULL) ON CONFLICT(email) DO UPDATE SET age = age + 1;
CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, value TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
INSERT INTO t2(ref_id, value) VALUES (1, 'Test Value'), (NULL, 'Another Value');
